__dependenciesComments.@nomicfoundation/hardhat-node-test-runne: Pinned explicitly only because toolbox-viem@5.0.7 declares the runner as a peerDependency, which pnpm otherwise resolves to 3.0.9; we need >=3.0.14 (in-process runner) to exercise the plugin's hang fix. Can be removed once the peer resolves to >=3.0.14 on its own.
